brief: [SMOKE TEST ONLY — do not use as the math library goal] In brix.math, add one total pure function using exact BrixMS syntax `fn abs(x: Int) -> Int = if x < 0 then -x else x` (not `function`/`end`/`return`). Do not add entities, capabilities, state, or new modules. Keep the change inside src/world.brix. Let the host handle formatting after check passes.
